fixesMade: Added the FLOW-17 role matrix Playwright suite for the 8 full role cells plus the referral banner variant.
Made the app-shell hideChrome mode suppress the topbar, sidebar, and sidebar margin so screenshots are chrome-free for admin and consumer roles.
Made the gig posting form and tenant-admin moderation view mobile-safe so the role matrix has no horizontal overflow.
Replaced generated P1 spec networkidle waits with the page sentinel to avoid Vite/i18n idle timing flake.
notes: The event-organiser role is excluded because ROLE-ANALYSIS-BATCH-04 marks it as no distinct FLOW-17 surface.
No pre-commit gate was run before commit per Luba's direct instruction in this conversation.
